candidate_summary: 24-stage cyclical pretraining curriculum inspired by Chinese jieqi solar terms; per-stage data mixtures tied to seasonal roles (foundation/instruction/alignment/reasoning), canary-perplexity-gated stage transitions, multi-year cyclical reset with LR-half-reset and adaptive stage duration.
content_words: li chun yu shui da han cycle

results.name: Cyclical Loss-Based Optimization (KBS 2025)
results.notes: Shares cyclical-schedule + threshold-gated transitions; lacks seasonal/phenological framing but functionally overlaps with cyclical reset and threshold gating.

results.name: Perplexity-Aware Data Scaling (2512.21515)
results.notes: Perplexity landscape predicting loss closely mirrors canary-perplexity gating for stage advancement in continual pretraining.

results.name: Pretraining Data Perplexity Correlations (2409.05816)
results.notes: Perplexity-correlated data selection overlaps with perplexity-driven stage-mixture choices, though not cyclical/staged.

results.name: Curriculum Learning LLM Pretraining (2601.21698)
results.notes: Curriculum + learning-phase checkpoint analysis directly aligns with multi-stage curriculum and stage-transition diagnostics.

results.name: Beyond Random Sampling Curriculum (2506.11300)
results.notes: Multi-stage data mixture with adaptive transitions is a near-direct functional analogue of the 24-stage mixture-rotation with gated transitions; jieqi framing is decorative.

results.name: Learning Rate Decay Curriculum (2511.18903)
results.notes: LR-decay + curriculum + model averaging overlaps with LR-half-reset on cyclical curriculum re-entry.

results.name: MLOps Multi-Stage Pretraining (OLMo 2/Phi-4/LongCat-Flash)
results.notes: Production multi-stage pretraining (web→quality, foundation→reasoning) is functionally the staged-mixture rotation the candidate proposes, just without the 24-stage/cyclical/jieqi packaging.

results.name: Perplexity Correlations OpenReview
results.notes: Perplexity-benchmark correlation for data selection overlaps with canary-perplexity-gated stage advancement.

decision_rationale: All 8 prior-art results trigger the hit rule, predominantly via keyword overlap (>=2), with 2 also crossing the semantic threshold and 3 crossing the functional threshold. The candidate's core mechanism — multi-stage pretraining curriculum with per-stage data mixtures, perplexity-gated stage transitions, cyclical/repeated schedule, and LR scheduling — is fully covered by existing work (notably Beyond Random Sampling Curriculum, Curriculum Learning LLM Pretraining, MLOps Multi-Stage Pretraining, and the perplexity-gating cluster). The Chinese 24-jieqi framing is a decorative cultural metaphor that does not introduce a novel learning mechanism distinct from established multi-stage cyclical curricula. Verdict: FAIL (not novel).
